Sign In Get Started

Intelligent
infrastructure.

Flybeth provides a robust suite of B2B tools designed to modernize every aspect of your travel agency's workflow, from inventory sourcing to revenue management.

Get startedView documentation

Global GDS pool

Instant access to Amadeus, Sabre, and Travelport inventory in a single unified search interface.

Smart ticketing

Our automated fulfillment engine routes every booking through the fastest available node for instant ticket issuance.

Revenue analytics

Deep-dive into your agency productivity with real-time charts and revenue reporting.

API integration

Connect your existing B2C storefront directly to our wholesale inventory through our robust JSON API.

Trust matrix

Bank-grade security protocols ensuring every transaction is verified and encrypted end-to-end.

Agent collaboration

Manage a large team of advisors with granular permission controls and shared client databases.

Millions of properties.
At your fingertips.

Our global property node aggregates feeds from HotelBeds, Expedia TAAP, and direct-contracted hotel chains. Manage thousands of room nights across every continent with real-time availability and instant confirmation.

  • Direct wholesale pricing
  • Last-minute availability
